questions.question: Explain the concept of Stack with an example. What is a stack? How does it differ from a queue? Explain with the help of a simple diagram or table.
Write a C++ program to demonstrate the usage of Stack using the built-in stack class. Also, explain the methods used in the program (push, pop, peek, empty).
How does stack implementation using arrays differ from the built-in stack class in C++? Explain with the help of an example code.
